nodes.name: chemical_descriptor_extraction
nodes.description: Parse SMILES strings once and derive numeric molecular descriptors and fingerprints from the resulting molecule graph.
nodes.conceptual_summary: SMILES parsing followed by reusable descriptor and fingerprint feature extraction.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: The research packet separates molecule graph construction from descriptor, Morgan fingerprint, and MACCS key analyses so one parsed molecule can feed multiple feature families.

nodes.name: smiles_to_mol
nodes.description: Parse a non-empty SMILES string into a sanitized RDKit molecule graph.

inputs.name: smiles
inputs.constraints: Non-empty SMILES string accepted by RDKit sanitization.

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: RDKit molecule object with at least one heavy atom.

nodes.conceptual_summary: SMILES string validation and molecule graph materialization.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Parsing is isolated so downstream descriptor atoms do not repeatedly tokenize and sanitize the same molecule.

nodes.name: compute_descriptors
nodes.description: Compute a compact RDKit descriptor vector for a molecule graph.

inputs.name: mol
inputs.constraints: RDKit molecule object with at least one atom.

inputs.name: descriptor_names
inputs.constraints: Optional non-empty descriptor names resolvable in rdkit.Chem.Descriptors.

nodes.type_signature: (mol: object, descriptor_names: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> NDArray[np.float64]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Continuous molecular feature extraction for QSAR-style models.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Continuous descriptors are a separate feature type from hashed and structural-key fingerprints.

nodes.name: morgan_fingerprint
nodes.description: Compute a dense binary Morgan circular fingerprint from a molecule graph.

inputs.name: mol
inputs.constraints: RDKit molecule object with at least one atom.

nodes.type_signature: (mol: object, radius: int = 2, n_bits: int = 1024) -> NDArray[np.int_]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Circular substructure hashing converted into a NumPy binary vector.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Morgan fingerprints are a distinct hashed structural representation from continuous descriptors and MACCS keys.

nodes.name: maccs_keys
nodes.description: Compute the public 166-bit MACCS structural key vector from a molecule graph.

inputs.name: mol
inputs.constraints: RDKit molecule object with at least one atom.

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: Binary vector containing the 166 public MACCS structural keys.

nodes.conceptual_summary: Dictionary-based structural key extraction with the unused RDKit padding bit removed.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: MACCS keys provide a human-interpretable structural fingerprint separate from Morgan hash features.
